---
title: "Publications & Presentations"
subtitle: "Academic contributions, research manuscripts, and conference presentations"
title-block-banner: true
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: publications
    contents: 
      - journal-articles.yml
      - gbd-contributions.yml
      - under-review.yml
      - working-papers.yml
      - conference-presentations.yml
      - posters.yml
      - invited-speaker.yml
    template: ../_templates/publication-card.ejs
    sort: "year desc"
---

::: {#publications}
:::
